name: hive
description: Hive memory over MCP — journal, tasks, decisions, search, and recall from Claude Desktop.
long_description: Connects Claude Desktop to a hive instance's stateless MCP server (`POST /mcp`) using a bearer API token. This is the LAN-friendly path: a bundled zero-dependency Node bridge forwards MCP stdio traffic to your hive over HTTP(S), so it works against hosts that aren't reachable from the public internet (Tailscale, LAN, localhost). If your hive is on public HTTPS, prefer adding it as a custom connector instead — see integrations/claude-desktop/README.md in the repo.

hive_url.title: Hive URL
hive_url.description: Base URL of your hive instance, e.g. https://hive.example.com or http://100.64.0.7:7878 — /mcp is appended automatically.

hive_token.title: API token
hive_token.description: Bearer token for the AI identity this Claude should act as — minted in hive under Account → API tokens.
